title: Sweet Smoky British Duck Fat Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly and fluffy dish featuring sweet duck fat combined with savory smoke for a unique flavor profile that's both appealing to kids and adults alike.

ingredients.name: Duck Fat
ingredients.notes: Make sure it's kosher and at safe temperature (350°F / 175°C)

instructions: Mix the duck fat with mild paprika, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
Place all vegetables on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the vegetable mixture over the vegetables and toss gently until coated evenly.
Roast in the preheated oven for about 20-25 minutes or until tender and lightly golden.
In a separate pan, heat a bit more duck fat (if needed) and add chopped onions. Sauté until translucent and fragrant.
Add baby spinach to the pan with the onions and cook for another minute until wilted.
Combine roasted vegetables with the stir-fried onions in the same pan over low heat for about 3 minutes, allowing flavors to blend together gently.
Serve hot as a side dish or as an entrée alongside grains or rice.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
